name: ORI Sovereign Toolset
description: Full JSON schemas for ORI native tools and PocketBase data plane management.

tools.name: ask_ori
tools.description: Ask ORI a question using the shared runtime.

question.description: The question or task for ORI.

surface.description: Product surface context. Omit to use the default baseline.

profile.description: Working style override (e.g. big_sister, dev_architect). Only honored when it belongs to the chosen surface.

tools.name: plan_with_ori
tools.description: Turn a goal into a short, practical plan.

goal.description: The goal or objective to plan.

tools.name: review_with_ori
tools.description: Review a draft, payload, or plan and return structured feedback.

context.description: Optional context about what the content is for.

tools.name: draft_with_ori
tools.description: Generate a clean first draft for a given prompt.

tools.name: send_email_via_ori
tools.description: Send outbound email through ORI's native runtime email layer. Requires runtime:email:send scope.

tools.name: recall_memory
tools.description: Retrieve memory fragments from ORI's memory layer for the authenticated tenant. Requires runtime:chat scope.

query.description: What to search for in memory.

tools.name: store_memory
tools.description: Store a memory fragment into ORI's memory layer for the authenticated tenant. Requires runtime:chat scope.

tools.name: list_spaces
tools.description: List knowledge Spaces for the authenticated tenant. Requires runtime:spaces scope.

tools.name: create_space
tools.description: Create a new tenant-scoped knowledge Space. Requires runtime:spaces scope.

tools.name: get_key_info
tools.description: Introspect the current API key — returns scopes, tenant, and app name. Available to any authenticated key.

tools.name: check_health
tools.description: Check ORI runtime health. Available to any authenticated key.

tools.name: register_first_party_app
tools.description: Use a trusted agb.* bootstrap key to mint an approved first-party runtime key via POST /agent/register.

app_name.description: The first-party app name (e.g. ORI Mobile).

tools.name: design_notion_formula
tools.description: Design a Notion formula for a given use case via ORI's Studio-side Notion builder.

tools.name: repair_notion_formula
tools.description: Diagnose and fix a broken Notion formula.

tools.name: explain_notion_formula
tools.description: Explain what a Notion formula does in plain language.

tools.name: list_surfaces
tools.description: Return the list of valid ORI product surfaces and their available working style profiles.

tools.name: list_working_styles
tools.description: Return working style profiles for a given surface.

tools.name: get_request_template
tools.description: Return a copy-paste request template for a common ORI API pattern.

template.description: Template name (e.g. studio, home_streaming, dev_streaming, email_send, capabilities_web_search).

tools.name: get_capabilities
tools.description: Return the ORI capability flags and available governed reflexes.

tools.name: pb_list_collections
tools.description: List all collections in the PocketBase instance.

tools.name: pb_list_records
tools.description: List records from a PocketBase collection with optional filter and sort.

tools.name: pb_get_record
tools.description: Fetch a single record from a PocketBase collection by ID.

tools.name: pb_create_record
tools.description: Create a new record in a PocketBase collection.

tools.name: pb_update_record
tools.description: Update an existing record in a PocketBase collection by ID.

tools.name: pb_delete_record
tools.description: Delete a record from a PocketBase collection by ID.
